title: leucanthemum vulgare subsp. eliasii
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. eliasii, also known as the daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. eliasii lie in its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its tannin and sesquiterpene lactone content. The health benefits of this plant include treating menstrual cramps, diarrhea, and fever, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. eliasii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
